nasb.text: Then let him be gracious to him, and say, ‘Deliver him from going down to the pit, I have found a ransom’;

esv.text: and he is merciful to him, and says, ‘Deliver him from going down into the pit; I have found a ransom;

cnv.text: 恩待他，說： ‘救贖他免下深坑； 我已經得到了贖價。’

ccb.text: 上帝就会怜悯他，说，‘别让他下坟墓， 我已得到他的赎金。’
